title: Dropdown Column Labels
excerpt: When I deactivate a label, it still shows up in the list when I’m trying to assign a label to an item, I can’t delete the labels since they are used, why should these labels be visible in the list if it can’t be used, I …

posts.author: Leo (Leo Lebovits)
posts.cookedHtml: When I deactivate a label, it still shows up in the list when I’m trying to assign a label to an item, I can’t delete the labels since they are used, why should these labels be visible in the list if it can’t be used, I would only have them visible when you try to edit the labels where you can reactivate.
